name: Honey Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and honey until well combined.
2. Add beaten eggs to the mixture, then add sifted flour mixed with baking soda, ginger, cinnamon, and salt. Mix thoroughly.
3. Pour the batter into a greased pan or two layers in a slow oven set at 275°F (135°C). Bake for about thirty minutes, checking closely as this cake can burn easily.
